headline: Nasdaq, US stocks slide as Fed forecasts possible rate hike
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) ended Wednesday's session in negative territory after Federal Reserve officials unanimously voted to hold interest rates at their June FOMC meeting today, while also forecasting at least one possible rate hike ahead. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre breaks down the trading day's market reactions to the Fed's big decision. This was Kevin Warsh's first FOMC meeting he presided over as the new chairman of the Fed.

headline: Broadcom (AVGO) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Valuation Gap Closing
summary: If you are wondering whether Broadcom stock still offers value at current levels, this article will walk through what the numbers are saying about its valuation. Broadcom has recently traded around US$376.71, with returns of 1.2% over the past week, down 10.5% over the past month, up 8.4% year to date and up 51.1% over the past year, alongside a very large gain over the past five years. Recent news coverage has focused on Broadcom's role in semiconductors and related technologies, as...

headline: US stocks drift ahead of the Fed's announcement on interest rates
summary: The U.S. stock market is drifting Wednesday as Wall Street waits to hear from the Federal Reserve in the afternoon about where it sees interest rates going.  The S&P 500 added 0.1%, coming off a mixed day where falling tech stocks weighed on the index.  Jabil jumped 12.4% after reporting stronger results for the latest quarter than analysts expected, as CEO Mike Dastoor said that “AI infrastructure demand remains extremely strong.”
